findings.description: The NC state logo and Energy, Mineral & Land Resources logo/branding image present in the PDF header is missing from the HTML version.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows an NC state logo with tree graphic and 'Energy, Mineral & Land Resources' text in the upper left corner. HTML page 1 has no such image.

findings.description: The PDF memo header has a two-column layout with the NC logo on the left and official names/titles on the right. The HTML renders these as a single left-aligned column at the top.
findings.evidence: PDF: Logo on left, 'PAT McCRORY Governor / DONALD R. VAN DER VAART Secretary / TRACY DAVIS Director' right-aligned. HTML: These names are left-aligned in a single column with no logo.

findings.description: The 'MEMORANDUM' title is underlined in the PDF but appears without underline in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF: 'MEMORANDUM' is centered and underlined. HTML: 'MEMORANDUM' appears as a large bold heading without underline decoration.

findings.description: The outline items in the report structure list use Roman numerals with different formatting. In the PDF they are indented and formatted as a structured list; in the HTML they appear as a simpler list.
findings.evidence: PDF shows indented Roman numeral list items (I through IV) with clear tabular alignment. HTML shows them as a simple bulleted-style list.
